config.script:
"""

		Purpose: Open side panel navigation to add entries. 
	"""
	system.perspective.openDock("rightp")
	messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	self.session.custom.type='Add'

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 20/04/2024
		Purpose: Open side panel navigation to edit entries. 
	"""
	system.perspective.openDock("rightp")
	self.session.custom.type='Edit'

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 23/04/2024
		Purpose: Open popup to take confirmation before deletion. 
	"""
	# Write your script here
	try:
	#Start of try block
#		self.session.custom.type = 'Delete'
		#added by yogesh to delete popup
		id = self.custom.id
		folder = self.custom.folder
		colName = self.custom.colName
		LevelId = self.custom.LevelId
		MessagePopup=0
		#split folder name to catch screen name deatils
		screenName1 = folder.split('/')
		screenName = screenName1[1]
		#system.perspective.print(screenName)
		#system.perspective.print("DeleteClickEvent:%s"%screenName)
		#system.perspective.print("DeleteClickEventfolder:%s"%folder)
		#system.perspective.print("DeleteClickEventscreenName1:%s"%screenName1)
		if screenName == 'User':
			state = 'info'
			userName = self.custom.userName
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete '+ str(userName) +' ?'
			
		elif screenName == 'Shift':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete Shift?'
			
		elif screenName == 'Device':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete Device?'
			
		elif screenName == 'Plant':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete Plant?'
		
		elif screenName == 'ModelConfiguration':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete Configutaion?'
		
		elif screenName == 'OPCode':
			params = {"OPCode":id}
			cntWI = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/OPCodeConfiguration/Get_WICountbyOPCodeName",params)
			pycntWI = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(cntWI)
			for i in pycntWI:
				count=i['Count']
			if count==0:
				state = 'info'
				message = 'Are you sure you want to delete selected OPCode?'
			else:
				MessagePopup=1
				state = 'Warning'
				message = "Can not delete this OPCode. It is assigned to work instruction."
			
		elif screenName == 'Role':
			state = 'info'
			RoleName = self.custom.RoleName
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete '+str(RoleName)+' ?'
		
		elif screenName == 'Image':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete?'
			
		elif screenName == 'ImageQG':
			state='info'
			message='Are you sure you want to delete?'
			
		
		elif screenName == 'ErrorProof':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete?'
		elif screenName == 'ErrorProofQG':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete?'
		elif screenName == 'GroupConfiguration':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete?'
		elif screenName == 'WI':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete selected Work Instruction?'
		elif screenName == 'Checklist':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete selected Checklist?'
		elif screenName == 'LocationRouting':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete selected Location Routing?'	
		elif screenName == 'Painting':
			state = 'info'
			message = 'Are you sure you want to delete selected Painting configuration ?'	
			imagePath = self.session.custom.paintingImageRemove
			Project_VECV.Master.ImageMasterConfiguration.Delete.deleteImage(imagePath)
				
		if 	MessagePopup == 0:	
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), "Confirm", str(message), "true", "No", "Yes", "close", "check", "right", "closePopup", "deleteNewPop", "closePopup", colName,folder,id,LevelId)	
		else:
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
	#End of try block
	except:
	#Start of except block
		screenName ='RightView'  
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Navigation/RightView')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onClick  -> imgDelete')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())  
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 20/04/2024
		Purpose: Open side panel navigation to delete entries. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
		if 'IsVisible' in payload:
			self.meta.visible = payload['IsVisible']

		if 'id' in payload:
			self.custom.id = payload['id']
		else:
			system.perspective.print("'id' key is missing in the payload.")

		if 'folder' in payload:
			self.custom.folder = payload['folder']

		if 'colName' in payload:
			self.custom.colName = payload['colName']

		# Fix: Set LevelId if available, otherwise set a default
		self.custom.LevelId = payload.get("LevelId", 0)

		if 'userName' in payload:
			self.custom.userName = payload["userName"]

		if 'RoleName' in payload:
			self.custom.RoleName = payload["RoleName"]

		system.perspective.print("In deleteIsVisible msghandler: %s" % (self.custom.id))

	except:
		screenName = 'RightView'
		filePath = 'Project_VECV/Navigation/RightView'
		errorFunction = 'Message Handler:deleteIsVisible -> imgDelete'
		errorType = 'Application'
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description = str(sys.exc_info()[1])
		lineNumber = str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno)
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(
			screenName, filePath, errorFunction, errorType, errorCode, description, lineNumber
		)

# implement your handler here
	try:
	#Start of try block
		self.custom.LevelId = payload['LevelId']
		system.perspective.print("In DELETE Details msghandler:%s"%self.custom.LevelId)
	#End of try block
	except:
	#Start of except block
		screenName ='RightView'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Navigation/RightView')
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:plantDeleteDetails -> imgDelete')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
	#End of except block

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 25/04/2024
		Purpose: Call message handler to download data. 
	"""
	messageType = 'Download'    	 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 20/04/2024
		Purpose: Upload excel for checklist configuration.
	"""
	try:
		#get uploaded file
		createdBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		uploaded_file = event.file
		Project_VECV.Quality.Checklist.ExcelUpload1.ExcelToDataset(uploaded_file,createdBy)	
	except:
		#Start of except block
		
			screenName ='RightView'
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/Navigation/RightView')
			errorFunction = str('Event : excelUpload Event -> excelUpload')
			errorType=str('Application')
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
			
			message = 'Something went wrong. Please contact MES administrator'
			#warning
			#info
			#success
			#error
			state = "error"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		#End of except block
